questions.question: What is the primary goal of web accessibility?
options: To ensure websites are usable by people with disabilities
questions.correctAnswer: To ensure websites are usable by people with disabilities

questions.question: When should ARIA roles and attributes be used?
options: Only when native HTML elements do not provide sufficient accessibility
questions.correctAnswer: Only when native HTML elements do not provide sufficient accessibility

questions.question: What is the purpose of the alt attribute on images?
options: To provide alternative text for screen readers and when images fail to load
questions.correctAnswer: To provide alternative text for screen readers and when images fail to load

questions.question: Why is keyboard accessibility important?
options: Some users rely on keyboards or assistive technologies instead of a mouse
questions.correctAnswer: Some users rely on keyboards or assistive technologies instead of a mouse

questions.question: What is a common issue with using only color to convey information?
options: It can make content inaccessible to users with color vision deficiencies
questions.correctAnswer: It can make content inaccessible to users with color vision deficiencies

questions.question: What does 'focus' refer to in web accessibility?
options: The currently visible section of a page
The element currently selected for keyboard interaction
The main heading of the page
The element with the highest z-index
questions.correctAnswer: The element currently selected for keyboard interaction

questions.question: Which practice improves accessibility for form inputs?
options: Using placeholder text instead of labels
Associating labels explicitly with form controls
questions.correctAnswer: Associating labels explicitly with form controls

questions.question: What is the purpose of skip navigation links?
options: To allow users to bypass repetitive navigation and jump to main content
questions.correctAnswer: To allow users to bypass repetitive navigation and jump to main content

questions.question: What does a sufficient color contrast ratio ensure?
options: Better visibility and readability for users, including those with visual impairments
questions.correctAnswer: Better visibility and readability for users, including those with visual impairments
